title: Faculty Induction and Professional Development Programme
content: Event Date: 26th September 2024 School of Agriculture, Galgotias University organised Faculty Induction and Professional Development Programme on 26th September 2024. The insights provided by Dr. ML Gaur, specifically on the promotion of teachers as active facilitators, must have been quite beneficial, particularly in an academic setting where the emphasis was on ongoing learning and growth. His acknowledgement of Galgotias University's recruitment efforts and the G-SCALE initiative demonstrate the university's dedication to academic achievement. The celebration of Hindi Diwas is encouraging as well, and Dr. Gaur's lyrical addition adds a significant cultural element. His all-encompassing strategy, which integrates institutional, cultural, and academic norms, looks to be a model for developing future teaching methods. By incorporating these principles, teacher responsibilities will undoubtedly be strengthened and student learning outcomes will be improved. The Galgotias University School of Agriculture successfully organised a Faculty Induction and Professional Development Program on September 26, 2024, with the goal of providing the faculty with the knowledge and skills necessary for ongoing professional development. Dr. ML Gaur, a former dean of Anand Agricultural University's College of Agricultural Engineering and Technology and vice chancellor of Dr. CV Raman University, presided over the occasion. Dr. Gaur, an IIT Roorkee alumni, offered insightful commentary on how teachers' roles are changing and emphasised the necessity for them to change from being passive lecturers to active learning facilitators. He emphasised the need of continuing education and advised teachers to encourage their pupils' creativity, critical thinking, and curiosity to create an environment of active learning. The program included a focus on academic development in addition to the celebration of Hindi Diwas, which gave the occasion an important cultural component. Dr. Gaur reflected on the importance of faculty development through the lenses of language and culture in a self-composed poem that ended the session. This poetic contribution emphasised how crucial it is for educational processes to incorporate both academic and cultural standards. Future teaching strategies might be inspired by Dr. Gaur's comprehensive approach, which integrates academic rigour, cultural relevance, and institutional principles. Adopting these concepts will reinforce teachers' duties and responsibilities, improving student results. The occasion enhanced teacher participation by stressing the need of cultural integration and offering crucial professional development insights. Event Outcome In conclusion, everyone who attended the Galgotias University School of Agriculture's Faculty Induction and Professional Development Program on September 26, 2024, found it to be a worthwhile experience. With his emphasis on ongoing development and innovation, Dr. ML Gaur's ideas on elevating educators to the status of active learning facilitators gave academic staff members a new outlook on how to improve their responsibilities in the classroom. Galgotias University's dedication to academic achievement was further highlighted by his acknowledgement of the institution's recruitment efforts and the G-SCALE program. Dr. Gaur's poem, which he wrote himself, gave the celebration of Hindi Diwas a cultural edge by fusing intellectual and cultural qualities. The institution is in a good position to increase faculty accountability and enhance student results by implementing Dr. Gaur's comprehensive strategy. Mentor Name – Dr. Shiwangi Srivastava and Anju Kapri Department Name – School of Agriculture
